name: hirn-literature-retrieve

metadata.description: Search HIRN (Human Islet Research Network) publications, retrieve full text from PubMed Central, and find relevant passages across ~1,160 articles from 9 HIRN consortia

plugins.name: hirn-literature-retrieve
plugins.description: Search HIRN (Human Islet Research Network) publications, retrieve full text from PubMed Central, and find relevant passages across ~1,160 articles from 9 HIRN consortia (CBDS, CHIB, CMAD, CMAI, CTAR, HIREC, HPAC, Opportunity Pool, PanKbase)

when_to_use: User asks to search HIRN publications on a topic
User mentions HIRN consortia (CBDS, CHIB, CMAD, CMAI, CTAR, HIREC, HPAC, PanKbase)
User wants to find islet research network articles
User needs relevant passages from HIRN literature
User asks about Human Islet Research Network published works
when_not_to_use: User asks to search PubMed broadly (not HIRN-specific)
User asks about clinical trials or databases unrelated to HIRN

test_queries: Search HIRN publications for islet autoimmunity
Find HIRN research on beta cell regeneration
What has the HPAC consortium published on pancreatic islets?
Search Human Islet Research Network for HLA markers
Find CBDS papers on type 1 diabetes prediction
